productName: Buddies Live Resin All in One Tanker - OZ Kush - 1g - (I)
description: This hybrid disposable carries OZ Kush in a ready-to-go pen with the battery built right in — grab it, hit it, recycle it when it's done. Grab-and-go convenience, with notes of honey, butter, and woody, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience.
